title: senecio ovatus subsp. ovatus
intro: Senecio ovatus subsp. ovatus, also known as the woolly Jacob's ladder or woolly ragwort, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is valued for its ability to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin problems. The health benefits of Senecio ovatus subsp. ovatus include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce swelling, and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying and processing the leaves and stems, which can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
